text: Being here feels surreal, as if I am a small part of an unfolding narrative of innovation and creativity. Soho Station exudes a quiet potential, with its modern, open space and subtle lighting. Moving into the R+D area, I sense an immersion into the spirit of inquiry. The vibrant displays and thoughtful quotes invite me to reflect on the intersection of human curiosity and technology. I feel simultaneously a spectator and a participant in a living experiment, inspired by the possibilities whispered by these walls.
